zh-CN.name: 字母G
zh-CN.intro: 字母G是第七个英文字母。它长得像一个圆圈加一个小钩子。G的发音像小鸽子咕咕叫。

story.title: 🎵字母G的故事
story.body: 字母G有一个圆圆的肚子和一个翘起的小尾巴。长颈鹿Gina说：我有一个长长的脖子，身体上有漂亮的斑纹。Gina喜欢优雅地散步。有一天，Gina遇见了一只绿色的青蛙，青蛙呱呱叫着，邀请Gina一起跳过小水坑。Gina说：我太高了，跳不动呀！于是青蛙跳上Gina的头顶，一起数数：一、二、三、四、五、六、七！第七个字母就是G！Gina和青蛙都开心地笑了。

knowledge.title: 字母G的起源
knowledge.body: 字母G是从古代拉丁字母演变而来的。它的形状原来像骆驼的脖子和头，后来慢慢变成现在的样子。在英语中，G经常发/g/的声音，像“goat”里的声音。

en.name: Letter G
en.intro: Letter G is the seventh letter of the alphabet. It looks like a circle with a little hook. G makes a sound like a goose honking.

story.title: 🎵The Story of Letter G
story.body: Letter G has a round tummy and a small hooked tail. Giraffe Gina said, I have a long neck and beautiful spots on my body. Gina loves to walk gracefully. One day, Gina met a green frog. The frog croaked and invited Gina to jump over a puddle together. Gina said, I'm too tall to jump! So the frog hopped onto Gina's head and they counted: one, two, three, four, five, six, seven! The seventh letter is G! Gina and the frog both smiled happily.

knowledge.title: Where does the letter G come from?
knowledge.body: The letter G developed from the ancient Latin alphabet. Its original shape looked like a camel's neck and head, and it gradually became what we see today. In English, G often makes the /g/ sound, as in the word goat.
